form.formComment: Dominant winner to post a big 7 lengths victory in a Maiden last start at this track, recording an enormous 22.33 over the 400m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Dominant winner to post a big 7 lengths victory in a Maiden last start at this track, recording an enormous 22.33 over the 400m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 515m at Gosford. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 515m at Gosford. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight, lost ground and shifted wide.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than he has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Facing tougher opposition than he has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

form.formComment: Ran an eye-catching race on debut when settled well off the lead early but got home well to finish third (30.23) at The Gardens over 515m. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran an eye-catching race on debut when settled well off the lead early but got home well to finish third (30.23) at The Gardens over 515m. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 400m at this track behind Shake Not Stir, beaten 9 lengths (22.97). Can't make much of a case this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 400m at this track behind Shake Not Stir, beaten 9 lengths (22.97). Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Has ability but remains a maiden after six starts, the most recent effort a seventh (25.92) over 440m at Goulburn. In the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has ability but remains a maiden after six starts, the most recent effort a seventh (25.92) over 440m at Goulburn. In the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 17 over 400m at The Gardens behind Sail Away Sam beaten 6 lengths (23.30) in a Grade 5. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 17 over 400m at The Gardens behind Sail Away Sam beaten 6 lengths (23.30) in a Grade 5. Well placed and among the chances here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the first turn, shifted inwards and came together.
